review_text: The Nifty index chart lags in Scalper chart. CE and PE are as per time. I have naked option bought and later I want to convert it to bull call strategy. The margin required get very high. Why? Bring safe exit commodity FnO.
Hello Team, The old version of Financial Performance was good.

Earlier, the UI was much simpler and more user-friendly. It allowed users to track market movements in both points and percentage simultaneously, making it easy to understand performance at a glance. The recent redesign has worsened the experience. Merging the quarterly and yearly revenue/profit charts into a single view has made financial analysis confusing. Features that were previously easy to access now require more effort and provide less clarity. I am planning to switch broker

I've been using Groww since July 2020 and appreciated its simplicity for trading. However, the charts have become painfully slow, lagging during volatile markets and making timely decisions impossible. Sahi's super lightning ⚡ speed charts are a game-changer by comparison—snappy and reliable. Time to switch platforms. Groww, please fix the charts!

I am extremely disappointed with the Grow app. It is a stock broker, but when I added 100 rupees, I had a 20 rupee loss, which, due to the broker’s fault, escalated to an 800 rupee loss. They took my limit order and treated it as a market order, and the stop loss hit too quickly, even though the price hadn’t reached that point. I advise everyone not to trade on this app, because no matter how many limit orders you place, they get executed as market orders, and the stop loss hits instantly witho
Groww is the best way for your financial growth.

Hello Groww app team, As you are aware, recent regulatory changes have made the TER of a mutual fund a highly volatile quantity. You need to urgently display the base expense ratio (BER) for better context. The TER id the BER plus brokerage costs plus taxes, and a single day of heavy trading by the fund manager caused the TER to misrepresent the actual value. This also masks actual increases in costs to the customer.
